notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Pete Crow-Armstrong steals (21) 2nd base. Pete Crow-Armstrong to 3rd. Wild pitch by pitcher Walker Buehler. Pete Crow-Armstrong to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Pedro Ramírez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Ramírez lines out to left fielder Gavin Sheets.

notableEvents.label: Dansby Swanson grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Dansby Swanson hits a grand slam (16) to left center field. Justin Dean scores. Michael Conforto scores. Miguel Amaya scores.

notableEvents.label: Pedro Ramírez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Ramírez lines out to left fielder Gavin Sheets.

notableEvents.label: Rodolfo Durán GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rodolfo Durán grounds into a double play, third baseman Alex Bregman to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Jake Cronenworth out at 2nd. Rodolfo Durán out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Dansby Swanson reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Xander Bogaerts. Miguel Amaya to 3rd. Miguel Amaya advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by second baseman Jake Cronenworth.

notableEvents.label: Rodolfo Durán GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rodolfo Durán grounds into a double play, second baseman Pedro Ramírez to shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch. Miguel Andujar to 3rd. Jake Cronenworth out at 2nd. Rodolfo Durán out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Rodolfo Durán rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rodolfo Durán grounds into a double play, second baseman Pedro Ramírez to shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch. Miguel Andujar to 3rd. Jake Cronenworth out at 2nd. Rodolfo Durán out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
